items.title: New York governor says she’s using AI to analyze ‘every single rule’ in the state

items.title: Segway officially offers a discount on the 2026 Myon e-bike packed with smart features for $1,800
items.summary:
Update 7/16: Segway has ended the full $450 first discount on this e-bike, but is continuing with a smaller $200 discount to $1,799.99 shipped.

Riding right alongside the amazing Xyber e-bike and extra battery bundle deal, Segway is officially offering the very first chance at savings on its Myon Electric Bike for $1,549.99 shipped. After its debut at CES 2026, this new e-bike model hit the market immediately after in January with a $2,000 MSRP, which is where it’s kept pricewise until today. Now, you can score the very first savings of $450 that is being slashed from the tag, setting the bar for future discounts down the road.

Woot’s offer highlighted here takes $150 off its usual going rate to mark one of the lowest prices we have tracked for it to date. We haven’t seen many notable discounts on this model since it briefly hit $450 during last year’s Black Friday sale, and it still delivers strong value at today’s price. Head below for more details.
